name: Barbecued Chicken Breast with Warm Potato and Bacon Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 boneless chicken breasts, skin left on
6 rashers smoked streaky bacon, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a barbecue, grill, or griddle. Season the chicken with salt and pepper, then rub one tablespoon of olive oil on it. Grill the chicken, skin-side down, for 8-10 minutes. Turn and cook for another 8-10 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, boil the potatoes for about 20 minutes. Drain them, then peel and halve or quarter as needed. Mix the remaining olive oil with vinegar and shallots, season to taste, then pour over the potatoes. Fry the bacon until crispy, then stir it into the potato salad with tarragon.
3. To serve, arrange mixed salad leaves on four plates. Spoon over the warm potato and bacon salad, and top with the chicken breasts.
